fullArticle:
Volume 17 - 2026 | https://doi.org/10.3389/fpsyg.2026.1811366

It is global issue that emergency nurses exhibit a high turnover rate due to excessive job stress and impaired professional quality of life (ProQOL). While sense of coherence (SOC), as a salutogenic psychological resource, may mediate these associations, its mediating role require...
